ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock (to account for splits and dividends) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount distributed on the date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient (1 for no split, adjusted for splits) */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock identifier */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock on the given date */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* The highest price of the stock in the past 52 weeks */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* The lowest price of the stock in the past 52 weeks */,
  "previous_close" REAL /* The closing price of the stock on the previous trading day */,
  "price_change" REAL /* The change in price from the previous close */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* The percentage change in price from the previous close */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date the stock was first listed on the stock exchange */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the company is headquartered */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* The name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the company was founded */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* The number of employees in the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A JSON object or a comma-separated list of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* A JSON object containing the query parameters used for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
